title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Synergy Property Development - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Synergy Property Development - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Synergy Property Development, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Nagpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Synergy Property Development:
Synergy Property Development is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Synergy Property Development!
